name: WhatWeb
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Next-generation web scanner that identifies technologies used by a website. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install whatweb` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali); not packaged for Fedora/Arch by default -- clone https://github.com/urbanadventurer/WhatWeb and run `bundle install` (Ruby). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
